frontmatter.title: Axioms for modelling cubical type theory in a topos
frontmatter.meta: @inproceedings{orton-pitts-2016, author = {Orton, Ian and Pitts, Andrew M.}, editor = {Talbot, Jean-Marc and Regnier, Laurent}, address = {Dagstuhl, Germany}, publisher = {Schloss Dagstuhl--Leibniz-Zentrum fuer Informatik}, booktitle = {25th EACSL Annual Conference on Computer Science Logic (CSL 2016)}, year = {2016}, doi = {10.4230/LIPIcs.CSL.2016.24}, isbn = {978-3-95977-022-4}, issn = {1868-8969}, pages = {24:1--24:19}, series = {Leibniz International Proceedings in Informatics (LIPIcs)}, title = {Axioms for Modelling Cubical Type Theory in a Topos}, volume = {62}, }
25th EACSL Annual Conference on Computer Science Logic (CSL 2016)
